cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. So, we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list the initial gifts first. Alice has a brown present. Bob has an orange ball. Claire has a green present. Dave has a blue present. Eve has a white present. So initially: - Alice: Brown - Bob: Orange - Claire: Green - Dave: Blue - Eve: White Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap
